commit_message:
feature/NQ-1770: Adds bootstrap clock to xwrc_platform_xilinx feature/NQ-1770: Adds bootstrap clock to xwrc_platform_xilinx - Adds new inputs : `clk_125m_bootstrap_{p,n}_i` and `clk_sys_sel_i` to the module
- Adds a new generic `g_with_bootstrap_clock_input`
- When `g_with_bootstrap_clock_input = TRUE` the `clk_sys_sel_i` input is routed to the `CLKINSEL` input of the MMCE_ADV otherwise it is driven high, selecting `CLKIN1`. This preserves the behaviour of existing modules which do not use a b
